description: The Clan dei Casamonica is a Romani mafia organization based in Rome, Italy, originating from Abruzzo and Molise. Founded in the late 1930s by Luciano Casamonica and Adelaide Spada, it evolved from semi-nomadic horse traders into a structured criminal group. The clan controls various illegal activities in Rome and Lazio, with ties to the Banda della Magliana. It remains active today.

country_links.evidence_quote: volevano far arrivare a Roma, dal Brasile, sette tonnellate di cocaina
country_links.context: The clan attempted to import seven tons of cocaine from Brazil to Rome.

country_links.evidence_quote: manteneva contatti diretti con i narcos colombiani
country_links.context: The clan maintained direct contacts with Colombian narcos for cocaine importation.

country_links.evidence_quote: Franco Casamonica: latitante in Francia dal 2019.
country_links.context: A member of the clan is a fugitive in France.

country_links.evidence_quote: traffico di stupefacenti nei Paesi comunitari di Germania , Spagna , Paesi Bassi e Italia
country_links.context: The clan is involved in drug trafficking in Germany.

country_links.evidence_quote: la restante parte del denaro era custodita in alcune banche nel Principato di Monaco
country_links.context: The clan laundered money and kept capital in banks in Monaco.

country_links.evidence_quote: traffico di stupefacenti nei Paesi comunitari di Germania , Spagna , Paesi Bassi e Italia
country_links.context: The clan is involved in drug trafficking in the Netherlands.

country_links.evidence_quote: traffico di stupefacenti nei Paesi comunitari di Germania , Spagna , Paesi Bassi e Italia
country_links.context: The clan is involved in drug trafficking in Spain.
Swiss police collaborated in an operation against the clan, indicating a footprint.
